quality.signature: function is not async fetchfromdb is
quality.label: Function is not `async`, `fetchFromDB` is called synchronously, and `data` uses `any` type.

quality.signature: fetchfromdb is called synchronously likely returning
quality.label: `fetchFromDB` is called synchronously, likely returning a Promise instead of user data.

quality.signature: function modifies user object but does
quality.label: Function modifies user object but does not persist changes to the database.

quality.signature: no error handling if fetchfromdb returns
quality.label: No error handling if `fetchFromDB` returns null or undefined for the user.

quality.signature: truthiness check for dataname and datarole
quality.label: Truthiness check for `data.name` and `data.role` might prevent empty string updates.

quality.signature: direct consolelog statements are not suitable
quality.label: Direct `console.log` statements are not suitable for production logging or notifications.

complexity.signature: nested if statements can be simplified
complexity.label: Nested if statements can be simplified

duplication.signature: function is identical to multiple other
duplication.label: Function is identical to multiple other functions

quality.signature: sql query is vulnerable to injection
quality.label: SQL query is vulnerable to injection attacks

quality.signature: synchronous file operations can block event
quality.label: Synchronous file operations can block event loop

quality.signature: using var instead of let or
quality.label: Using var instead of let or const

quality.signature: manual iteration instead of array methods
quality.label: Manual iteration instead of array methods
